reason: DootSabha claude+gemini council could not complete on the implementation diff. Attempts either hung, returned provider deadline errors, or failed synthesis. A separate Gemini consult on the concise current implementation review completed with APPROVE.
fallback_reviewers: dootsabha consult --agent claude saved as dootsabha-implementation-claude.json

findings.finding: esc_dispatch leaked active grapheme anchor across ESC cursor/grid movement sequences.
findings.resolution: Resolved by clearing active_grapheme_cell at the start of esc_dispatch and adding combining_after_esc_line_movement_does_not_attach_to_stale_cell.

findings.finding: cursor_cell_extended deep-cloned extended attrs per styled cell, regressing Arc sharing for styled runs.
findings.resolution: Resolved by restoring cursor.extended Arc cloning and adding styled_ascii_cells_share_cursor_extended_attrs.

findings.finding: SOLID-QA.md hard gate was still missing.

verdict: Implementation review found no P0 blockers. Known P1 code findings from fallback/Claude review were fixed; Gemini consult approved the current concise implementation packet; SOLID QA remains the final hard gate.
